headline: AIG to Acquire Everest Colombia Unit, Expand Latin America Footprint
summary: AIG will acquire Everest Colombia to expand its Latin America commercial insurance business and deepen broker and client ties.

raw.headline: AIG to Acquire Everest Colombia Unit, Expand Latin America Footprint
raw.summary: AIG will acquire Everest Colombia to expand its Latin America commercial insurance business and deepen broker and client ties.

headline: Why American International Group (AIG) is a Great Dividend Stock Right Now
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does American International Group (AIG) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: AIG agrees to buy Everest Group’s Colombia insurance unit
summary: The deal covers the Everest Colombia unit’s authorised operations, staff and existing insurance portfolio.
